name: Auto Contextual Alts
long_description:
* This plugin analyses the vb's audio file names to get the phoneme sequence and compare them to get the right alternative alias. Works best for Arpasing banks to align the right allophone alts so no more guessing them.
* Works with phoneme formatted files (eg: hh_eh_l_ow_w_er_l_d.wav) or moresampler csv formatted files (eg: 110.wav)
* Extract this into the plugins folder and open OU, to use this, go to Batch Edits > External > Batch Auto Contextual Alts

name: Per Track Singer's Expression
long_description:
* You can copy and customize the expressions.yaml per singer so when using this plugin, it loads all the singer's expression in the track
* if there's no file yet in the singer's folder, it will use the main one in the plugins folder
* Fixed a bug where curve params did not apply to the track

name: Batch Automatic Normalizer Plugin
long_description:
* This plugin was built with Net8 and requires OpenUTAU version v0.1.568.0 and above in order to work
* You can customize the normalize-config.yaml to specify phoneme groups and specific aliases to apply the P flag in the parameter directly.
* You can copy normalize-config.yaml to the singer's folder so each singer has a different P flag output
